title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down four strategies that Garry Tan, CEO of Y Combinator, uses with Claude Code to ship 600,000 lines of code in 60 days. The strategies include role assignment, parallel sessions, custom tool building, and planning before implementation. The video references Boris Cherny's related work and highlights Tan's open-source gstack system.
